name: carevacancy
description: ``` carevacancy/ ├── pages/ │   ├── signup.html       ← Role selection + account creation + verification flow │   └── login.html        ← Login with status checks (pending/rejected/suspended) ├── dashboards/ │   └── dashboard-admin.html  ← Admin verification queue + user management ├── css/ │   ├── global.css        ← All shared styles (change once, updates everywhere) │   ├── nav.css           ← Navigation styles │   └── auth.css          ← Signup + login styles ├── js/ │   ├── supabase.js       ← Database connection + ROLES + TIERS config │   └── nav.js            ← Dynamic nav rendering (logged in/out states) └── components/     └── nav.html          ← Nav HTML template ```
